Ntc Of Motion To Compel Morris Bergeron, Jr.'S Responses To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sudhir Lay, Atty. for defendant and moving party: TETRA TECH EM, INC.
No appearances made by Plaintiff.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT TETRA TECH EM INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Morris Bergeron, Jr.'s Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff Morris Bergeron, Jr. in the amount of $394, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
